job_title: Software Engineer, AI/ML, Geo Data Protection
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer, AI/ML, Geo Data Protection
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Programming Languages, Machine Learning Infrastructure, Model Deployment, Model Evaluation
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Programming Languages:1.0, Machine Learning Infrastructure:1.0, Model Deployment:0.5, Model Evaluation:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience, 2 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages, or 1 year of experience with an advanced degree, 1 year of experience with ML infrastructure (e.g., model deployment, model evaluation, optimization, data processing, debugging)
preferred_quals: Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or related technical fields, 2 years of experience with data structures and algorithms, Experience developing accessible technologies, Experience with techniques for handling dynamic web content and anti-scraping measures
core_responsibilities: Write product or system development code, Collaborate with peers and stakeholders through design and code reviews to ensure best practices amongst available technologies (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency), Contribute to existing documentation or educational content and adapt content based on product/program updates and user feedback, Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing the sources of issues and the impact on hardware, network, or service operations and quality, Implement solutions in one or more specialized ML areas, utilize ML infrastructure, and contribute to model optimization and data processing
job_summary: Google is a leading technology company focused on next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect and interact. The role involves developing software solutions for Google's Geo team, aimed at building accurate and comprehensive mapping products while solving complex computer science problems.
